name: codex-starter-kit
description: Guided creation and truthful lifecycle status for Codex Starter Kit repositories

interface.shortDescription: Create and inspect Starter Kit managed repositories.
interface.longDescription: A skills-only adapter for approved create planning/application and read-only status while preserving the standalone Starter Kit engine's authority and fail-closed compatibility boundary.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me create or inspect a Codex Starter Kit managed repository.
